title: API Contract - Campaign
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-017' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-017' to ingest requirements
Implement FastAPI routers and Pydantic schemas in `backend/app/` for endpoints
Run Pytest to verify API endpoints return correct status codes and payloads
definition_of_done: Pydantic schemas created for request/response validation
API tests pass with proper HTTP status codes
All modified source files have @trace annotation
